note: seq=100: AUTO-HEAL restart of the enrichment worker (Channel 2 stalled at 0/min while intake flows and queue holds ~1.45M). daemon-reload + reset-failed + non-raising restart of atlas-enrich.service and atlas-enrich-async-ramp.service. subprocess.run never raises so a missing-unit name cannot halt the lane.

steps.note: seq=100: revive stalled enrichment worker; safe non-raising restart.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',u]), s.run(['systemctl','restart',u])) for u in ['atlas-enrich.service','atlas-enrich-async-ramp.service','atlas-async-ramp.service'] ]; print('enrich restart issued')"
